Title: User Registration Process
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: password123
- Email: test@example.com
- Date of Birth: 01/01/1990
Test Steps:
1. Main requests user data from Local User.
2. Local User confirms data retrieval.
3. Local User sends data to Data Manager for validation.
4. Data Manager requests data re-entry if invalid.
5. Local User sends data to Data Manager for addition.
6. Data Manager confirms user addition.
Expected Result: User data is successfully added to the system.

Title: Data Validation During User Registration
Test Data:
- Invalid email format: test@example
- Valid email format: test@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Main requests user data from Local User.
2. Local User confirms data retrieval.
3. Local User sends data to Data Manager for validation.
4. Data Manager requests data re-entry if invalid.
5. Local User sends data to Data Manager for addition.
6. Data Manager confirms user addition.
Expected Result: Data Manager requests re-entry for invalid email format and confirms addition for valid email format.

Title: User Profile Creation
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: password123
- Email: test@example.com
- Date of Birth: 01/01/1990
- Green Points: 100
Test Steps:
1. User logs in using AuthenticationSystem.
2. UserProfile interacts with DataManager to retrieve user details.
3. UserProfile updates user profile with new data.
4. DataManager stores updated user profile.
Expected Result: User profile is successfully created and stored in the system.

Title: Notification System Interaction
Test Steps:
1. UserProfile triggers a notification event.
2. NotifySystem interacts with DataManager to fetch user details.
3. NotifySystem sends a welcome notification to the user.
Expected Result: User receives a welcome notification.

Title: Achievement Tracking
Test Data: - User achieves a milestone: 100 green points
Test Steps:
1. User earns green points through gameplay.
2. Achievements interacts with DataManager to track user progress.
3. Achievements sets an achievement for reaching 100 green points.
Expected Result: User is awarded an achievement for reaching 100 green points.

Title: Web Server Communication
Test Steps:
1. DataManager communicates with WebServer.
2. WebServer communicates with Database.
3. WebServer retrieves user-specific data from Database.
4. WebServer returns data to DataManager.
Expected Result: WebServer successfully retrieves and returns user-specific data.

Title: Database Interaction
Test Steps:
1. WebServer communicates with Database.
2. Database retrieves user-specific data.
3. Database returns data to WebServer.
Expected Result: Database successfully retrieves and returns user-specific data.
